name: 86 Chaos 15.0.96 Help Center Safety + Test Route Wait Fix
label: 15.0.96 Help Center Safety + Test Route Wait Fix
notes: Help Center safety hotfix: non-super-admin Help Center and training manual views no longer surface internal System Administrator, Forensics, Backup Center, Security Center, QuickBooks integration, Python automation, or pay-rate setup material. System Admin route gate remains generic for unauthorized accounts.
